final_state.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]
    Ready["Ready"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 好的，我们来构建一个进程生命周期状态图。首先需要建立核心框架。进程从创建到执行，最基本的两个状态是什么？

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 进程创建时是新建状态，然后进入执行状态。

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 没错，我们先添加两个基础状态：New（新建）表示进程刚被创建，还有Running（运行）表示进程正在CPU上执行。这是进程生命周期的基础框架。

gate.reason: turn 3 reached end boundary for stage 1

planner.notes: Added New and Running states as the core framework for the process lifecycle.

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 现在图上有New和Running两个状态了。接下来应该扩展功能分支了吧？

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 对，现在我们考虑运行中的进程可能会遇到什么情况。当进程需要等待I/O操作或某些事件完成时，它会进入什么状态？

turn.speaker: 参与者B
turn.content: 应该进入等待状态，表示进程暂时阻塞无法继续执行。

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 很好，我们添加Waiting状态，并从Running画一条边到Waiting，标注为"I/O or event wait"，表示进程因等待而阻塞。

planner.notes: Added Waiting state and edge from Running for I/O wait.

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 图上现在有New、Running、Waiting三个状态了。接下来需要考虑进程的终止和挂起机制吗？

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 对，现在我们完善图的结构。进程执行完成后会退出，所以需要添加什么状态？

turn.speaker: 参与者B
turn.content: 需要Terminated状态，进程正常结束时进入该状态并释放资源。

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 没错，从Running到Terminated画一条边，标注为"Exit"。另外，操作系统可能需要将等待中的进程换出内存以腾出空间，这引入了挂起机制。我们添加Suspended_Wait状态表示被挂起且正在等待的进程。

planner.notes: Added Terminated and Suspended_Wait states as per dialogue.

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 所以还需要一条从Waiting到Suspended_Wait的边，表示进程被换出内存。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 完全正确，这条边标注为"Swap out"。现在我们已经有了五个状态。接下来需要解决挂起进程被恢复后的流向问题。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

turn.speaker: 参与者B
turn.content: 被挂起的进程等待I/O完成后，应该可以恢复到就绪状态等待调度。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 很好，我们需要一个中间状态来区分"被挂起的等待"和"被挂起的就绪"。添加Suspended_Ready状态，并从Suspended_Wait到Suspended_Ready画一条边表示I/O完成但仍在换入过程中。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]

planner.notes: Added Suspended_Ready state and edge from Suspended_Wait per dialogue.

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 现在Suspended_Ready状态也有了，图的结构更加完整了。最后一步是添加什么？

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 最后添加核心的调度相关元素。进程创建后需要先进入就绪队列才能被调度，这就是Ready状态——表示进程已准备好运行，只等CPU分配。添加从New到Ready的边标注为"Admit"，表示新进程被接纳进入就绪队列。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

planner.notes: Added Ready state and New-Ready edge labeled Admit.

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]
    Ready["Ready"]

    Waiting["Waiting"]

    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

turn.speaker: 参与者B
turn.content: 还需要Ready到Running的调度边，以及Running可能被打断回到Ready的边对吧？

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]
    Ready["Ready"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 对，从Ready到Running标注"Dispatch"，从Running到Ready标注"Interrupt"。还要添加Waiting完成I/O后回到Ready的边，以及Suspended_Ready换入内存后进入Ready的边。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    New["New"]
    Running["Running"]
    Waiting["Waiting"]
    Terminated["Terminated"]
    Suspended_Wait["Suspended_Wait"]
    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]
    Ready["Ready"]

turn.speaker: 参与者A
turn.content: 这样所有的状态和转换关系都齐全了，整个进程生命周期状态图就完整了！

    Suspended_Ready["Suspended_Ready"]

turn.speaker: 系统设计师
turn.content: 没错，现在图上有New、Running、Waiting、Terminated、Suspended_Wait、Suspended_Ready、Ready共七个状态，以及九条转换边，完整描述了进程从创建到终止，以及挂起和调度的完整生命周期。任务完成。
